allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) accounts = data.get\(''accounts'', []\) for a in accounts: f = a.get\(''firmographics''\) or {} domain = \(a.get\(''website''\) or ''''\).replace\(''https://www.'',''''\).replace\(''https://'',''''\).replace\(''http://www.'',''''\).replace\(''http://'',''''\).rstrip\(''/''\) print\(f""{domain}|{f.get\(''hq_city'',''''\)}|{f.get\(''hq_region'',''''\)}|{f.get\(''hq_country'',''''\)}|{f.get\(''industry'',''''\)}|{f.get\(''employee_count'',''''\)}|{f.get\(''funding_stage'',''''\)}|{f.get\(''revenue_usd'',''''\)}|{a.get\(''linkedin_url'',''''\)}""\) ")
